## nsc integrations tailscale remove

Remove a named Tailscale integration spec.

```
nsc integrations tailscale remove <name> [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help            help for remove
  -o, --output string   One of plain or json. (default "plain")
```

* [nsc integrations tailscale](nsc_integrations_tailscale.md)	 - Manage Tailscale integration specs for the current workspace.
